sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ἐλισάβετ

- Transliteration: Elisabet

- Phonetic: el-ee-sab'-et

- Definition: Elisabeth = "oath of God"

1. the wife of Zacharias and mother of John the Baptist, of the priestly family, and a relative of Mary, Lk. 1:36

- Origin: of hebrew origin H472

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: Of hebrew origin [H472]; Elisabet an Israelitess: - Elisabeth.
